originalDescription: Set up composite TypeScript configuration across the monorepo. Add "composite": true to root tsconfig.base.json and add "references" array pointing to each package. Create per-package tsconfig.json files with "composite": true and "declarationMap": true. This enables incremental builds and proper cross-package type checking via Turborepo.
sanitizedDescription: Set up composite TypeScript configuration across the monorepo. Add "composite": true to root tsconfig.base.json and add "references" array pointing to each package. Create per-package tsconfig.json files with "composite": true and "declarationMap": true. This enables incremental builds and proper cross-package type checking via Turborepo.
